plan_status: adopted 30 September 2021, effective 11 November 2021 (Variations No.1-3 since)
fetch_method: curl.exe raw PDF download + local pdftotext extraction (WebFetch could not parse the PDF binary)
notes: Standalone Chapter 13 PDF (2.5MB). Two-column layout extracted cleanly via pdftotext -layout. Captured density+plot (Table 13.3), private OS (Table 13.4), 15% public OS, 22m separation, parking standards (Table 13.11, 3-area), parking dimensions (Table 13.9), EV 20%, sightlines (Table 13.13, Y up to 215m). Rural one-off uses Rural Policy Zone criteria (Chapter 3) rather than a fixed minimum site area; ribbon = 5 houses / 250m frontage.
